recommendations.title: Hell on the Border
recommendations.overview: In the late 1800s, legendary marshal Bass Reeves sets out on the trail of notorious outlaw Bob Dozier.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.

recommendations.title: Django Unchained
recommendations.overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

recommendations.title: Big Jake
recommendations.overview: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson.

recommendations.title: Hannie Caulder
recommendations.overview: After she's raped by the outlaw trio who murdered her husband, a frontierswoman hires a bounty hunter to instruct her in the ways of a gun in order to exact her revenge.

recommendations.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
recommendations.overview: Lawman Wyatt Earp and outlaw Doc Holliday form an unlikely alliance which culminates in their participation in the legendary Gunfight at the O.K. Corral.

recommendations.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: The Hangman's Daughter
recommendations.overview: Narrowly escaping death, outlaw Johnny Madrid goes on the run with the hangman's sensuous daughter Esmeralda by his side.

recommendations.title: The Harder They Fall
recommendations.overview: Gunning for revenge, outlaw Nat Love saddles up with his gang to take down enemy Rufus Buck, a ruthless crime boss who just got sprung from prison.

recommendations.title: Brimstone
recommendations.overview: In the menacing inferno of the old North-American West, Liz is a genuine survivor who is hunted by a vengeful preacher for a crime she didn’t commit.

recommendations.title: For a Few Dollars More
recommendations.overview: Two bounty hunters both pursue the brutal and sadistic bandit, El Indio, who has a large bounty on his head.
